items.title: Into the Omniverse: Three Workflows for Improving Vision AI Agent Accuracy With Synthetic Data and Fine-Tuning
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「Agent Skill、Harness、工具调用和自动化研发」。原文摘要显示：Vision AI agents are becoming a practical way to automatically turn video data from the physical world into operational intelligence in factories, cities, warehouses and transportation systems.
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。

items.title: DeepSeek V4 Is Earning Agentic Token Share — OpenRouter Blog
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「Agent Skill、Harness、工具调用和自动化研发」。原文摘要显示：DeepSeek doubled its token share on OpenRouter in six months. V4 Flash is the model that made it happen, and agentic workloads are driving the surge.
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。

items.title: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「大模型训练、推理、RAG、后训练或评测」。原文摘要显示：Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.
items.insightText: 先快速判断它是否包含可复用方法、架构或工程经验，再决定是否进入日报深读。

items.title: Circuits Updates — June 2026
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「大模型训练、推理、RAG、后训练或评测」。原文摘要显示：A short update on turn-averaged sparse autoencoders.
items.insightText: 关注数据、训练、推理、RAG 或评测设计，评估是否能沉淀到轨迹/地址大模型架构。
